positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed central crest design featuring an ornate fusion of celestial motifs and tropical flora. The main subject includes gracefully looping jungle vines, stylized crescent moons, and interconnected geometric mandalas. The style must be a blend of Neo-Art Deco and Bio-Luminescence Surrealism. Composition must be perfectly balanced and designed as a repeatable, strong silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Use strong, bold black outlines and contrasting color fields. Color palette should consist of deep sapphire blues, emerald teals, and accented by glowing neon magenta and cyan highlights. The overall effect must be high-contrast, visually dramatic, and printed with saturated, jewel-toned colors. Flat color rendering with volumetric lighting accents.
